question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/repository/ContractResultRepository.java -> Scope: '] [Function: findById(Long id)] Can an unprivileged external user enumerate all ContractResult records by sequentially calling findById() with incrementing consensusTimestamp values, leaking the full history of contract executions including functionParameters and callResult byte arrays, causing mass data disclosure?
